description: This schematic map illustrates an open coastal lagoon environment, displaying various land cover and water body types with a corresponding legend. The represented geographic features include a large Coastal lagoon (light blue) connected to the Open sea (dark blue) by a channel that cuts through a Sand bank (yellow). The land surrounding the lagoon system is classified as Irrigated land (light green). Within the Coastal lagoon, there are several areas (labelled A, B, C, D) depicted as Reedbeds and marsh plants (grey areas with green reed icons). Area B is situated close to the irrigated land, while areas A, C, and D are distributed as islands or peninsulas within the lagoon. No scale bar, compass, or specific reference year is provided.
